# Pull Request Template

Thank you for contributing to ZapisAxis! Please fill out this template to help us review your pull request efficiently.

## Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the changes or additions in this pull request. Explain the purpose and impact of your changes.

- What does this PR do?
- Why is this change necessary?
- How does it address the issue (if applicable)?

## Related Issues

List any related GitHub issues this PR addresses (e.g., `Fixes #123`, `Closes #456`).

## Type of Change

Check the appropriate boxes:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code style or formatting
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you performed to verify your changes. Include details about:

- Local testing environment (e.g., Windows 11, XAMPP 8.0.30).
- Steps to reproduce or validate the changes.
- Any automated tests added (if applicable).

## Checklist

Ensure your pull request meets the following requirements:

- [ ] My code follows the [Code Style and Standards](CONTRIBUTING.md#code-style-and-standards) of the project.
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally with XAMPP and MySQL.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (if applicable).
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new warnings or errors.
- [ ] I have added necessary comments for complex logic.
- [ ] I have adhered to the [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Attach screenshots or GIFs to demonstrate UI changes or reproduce issues.

## Additional Notes

Add any other context or information about the pull request here, such as challenges faced, trade-offs made, or future improvements planned.

---

Thank you for your contribution! We’ll review your pull request as soon as possible. Please be responsive to feedback or requests for changes.
